title: RSO App Approved & Production API Access Granted

items.text: Riot Sign-On (RSO) application officially approved by Riot Games — production OAuth2 credentials are now active
Production API access granted — rate limits upgraded from personal-key tier to production tier (significantly higher throughput)
RSO OAuth2 flow fully validated in production environment — /api/auth/riot/login → callback → session pipeline confirmed working end-to-end
Players can now sign in with their official Riot account — game_name, tag_line, level, card and rank data pulled via authenticated RSO session
Production API application process initiated — VAL-MATCH-V1 and full match data endpoints targeted for next approval stage
Riot Developer Policy compliance audit passed — disclaimer texts, data handling and user consent flow reviewed and confirmed
UserConsent model added to MongoDB schema — opt-in/opt-out tracking with timestamps per PUUID as required by Riot's data policy
